channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Secret Service fatally shoots suspect outside White House checkpoint, bystander wounded
item.description: The suspect began shooting at posted officers, who returned fire and hit the shooter, the Secret Service said. A bystander was also shot, a law enforcement official said, but it's unclear by whom.
item.content:encoded:
The suspect began shooting at posted officers, who returned fire and hit the shooter, the Secret Service said. A bystander was also shot, a law enforcement official said, but it's unclear by whom.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: The fascinating way Milwaukee tenants are fighting one of the city's largest landlords
item.description: In the series "How to Evict Your Landlord," WUWM reporters Sam Woods and Jimmy Gutierrez tell the story of how a group of tenants are working to push out one of the city's largest corporate landlords.
item.content:encoded: In the series "How to Evict Your Landlord," WUWM reporters Sam Woods and Jimmy Gutierrez tell the story of how a group of tenants are working to push out one of the city's largest corporate landlords.
item.dc:creator: Mallory Yu

item.title: What will Trump do next with Iran?
item.description: Three months since the start of its conflict with Iran, the Trump administration is oscillating between strike threats and diplomatic overtures. Neither path has yielded a clear resolution.
item.content:encoded:
Three months since the start of its conflict with Iran, the Trump administration is oscillating between strike threats and diplomatic overtures. Neither path has yielded a clear resolution.

(Image credit: Rod Lamkey)
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx

item.title: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, his family says
item.description: The two-time NASCAR champion died on Thursday, a day after passing out in a Chevrolet simulator.
item.content:encoded:
The two-time NASCAR champion died on Thursday, a day after passing out in a Chevrolet simulator.

(Image credit: Derik Hamilton)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Tennessee judge dismisses federal human smuggling charges against Kilmar Abrego García
item.description: A federal judge in Tennessee cleared Kilmar Abrego Garcia of all criminal charges. His case gained attention when the Trump administration wrongly deported him to a notorious prison in El Salvador.
item.content:encoded: A federal judge in Tennessee cleared Kilmar Abrego Garcia of all criminal charges. His case gained attention when the Trump administration wrongly deported him to a notorious prison in El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: Marianna Bacallao

item.title: Congress tackles crises of lowering housing costs and boosting overall housing supply
item.description: America's housing market has two major problems – not enough homes for sale and the ones that are available are too pricey. Congress hopes its latest bill will help with both.
item.content:encoded: America's housing market has two major problems – not enough homes for sale and the ones that are available are too pricey. Congress hopes its latest bill will help with both.
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha

item.title: How the 'cemetery citizens' are reclaiming and restoring marginalized burial grounds
item.description: Sherill Baldwin can often be found at an overgrown cemetery in Connecticut. She found it by chance, but now she's part of a movement of "cemetery citizens"--providing some TLC to forgotten plots.
item.content:encoded: Sherill Baldwin can often be found at an overgrown cemetery in Connecticut. She found it by chance, but now she's part of a movement of "cemetery citizens"--providing some TLC to forgotten plots.
item.dc:creator: Meg Dalton

item.title: 15 years since a deadly tornado brought Joplin, Mo. together, kindness carries on
item.description: Nearly 100,000 volunteers helped the town rebuild and a spirit of community service continues to this day. Researchers studying human behavior catastrophes can bring out compassion in surprising ways.
item.content:encoded:
Nearly 100,000 volunteers helped the town rebuild and a spirit of community service continues to this day. Researchers studying human behavior catastrophes can bring out compassion in surprising ways.

(Image credit: FEMA)
item.dc:creator: Pauline Bartolone

item.title: 'I'd wait forever, but 334 days is crazy.' USS Ford finally comes home
item.description: The USS Ford came home to a hero's welcome. Sailors had been away from home for nearly a year, through two conflicts, a fire and problems with the sewage system.
item.content:encoded:
The USS Ford came home to a hero's welcome. Sailors had been away from home for nearly a year, through two conflicts, a fire and problems with the sewage system.

(Image credit: Mike Kropf)
item.dc:creator: Steve Walsh

item.title: One solution for Maine's struggling fishing industry? Give fillets away for free
item.description: Surging food costs and fuel prices are pummeling Maine's struggling groundfishing industry. But a pandemic-era program is helping to keep it afloat as inflation worsens.
item.content:encoded:
Surging food costs and fuel prices are pummeling Maine's struggling groundfishing industry. But a pandemic-era program is helping to keep it afloat as inflation worsens.

(Image credit: Ryan David Brown for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Joe Hernandez
